champion_line: Wire to wire, 13–1, and not one gracious word about it. The best team we’ve had in six years, and the most insufferable.
last_place_line: Buys the trophy. Wears the trophy. Posts a photo.
footer_line: Lawson Family & Friends Fantasy League · Season VI in the books

awards.name: Best Draft Pick
awards.citation: Round two. 340 points. Highway robbery in broad daylight.

awards.name: Biggest Bust
awards.citation: Drafted second overall. Dropped in October. A complete round trip.

awards.name: Waiver Wire Wizard
awards.citation: Picked up three starters off the scrap heap and made the semis with them.

awards.name: Worst Trade
awards.citation: Traded Bijan for Rachaad White and a bad feeling. Still hasn’t recovered.

awards.name: Highest Single Week
awards.citation: Week 9. Everything hit. Told us about it until Week 12.

awards.name: Most Points, No Title
awards.citation: Led the league in scoring. Lost in round one. Fantasy football is cruel.

awards.name: Best Team Name
awards.citation: Six years running. Nobody else is close.

awards.name: Least Active Manager
awards.citation: Started a player on bye. Twice. In the playoffs.
